Navigating Star Atlas - Vehicles

Vehicles are a massive cornerstone in Star Atlas. 

What's the process of building a vehicle from scratch? What about vehicle manufacturers? 

Learn all of this and more in the new Navigating Star Atlas episode with our Vehicle Art Director, Gary Sanchez!
